name: Ponytail
description: Forces the laziest solution that actually works — stdlib first, native features before dependencies, minimal code. YAGNI enforcement.

name: shadcn/ui
description: Build UI components with shadcn/ui — manage components, search registries, apply preset codes, and compose design systems.

name: Design Taste (Frontend)
description: Anti-slop frontend skill for landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns. Ships interfaces that don't look templated.

name: Agent Browser
description: Fast browser automation CLI for AI agents. Navigate pages, fill forms, click buttons, take screenshots, scrape data.

name: Prisma Client API
description: Prisma ORM queries, filters, operators, and client methods reference. Use when writing database queries or CRUD operations.

name: Cloudflare Platform
description: Comprehensive Cloudflare guide — Workers, Pages, KV, D1, R2, Durable Objects, AI, WAF, DDoS, and infrastructure-as-code.

name: SEO Optimizer
description: Optimize for search engine visibility — meta tags, structured data, sitemaps, OG cards, and ranking improvements.

name: Security Best Practices
description: Language and framework-specific security reviews. Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go. Secure-by-default coding guidance.
